name: Doyen International Holdings Limited
summary: Doyen International Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides loan financing services in the People's Republic of China. The company operates through Investment Property Holding, Dongkui Business, Sales of Flowers and Plants, and Distressed Assets Management segments. It is also involved in the investment and rental of properties. The company owns Dong Dong Mall, a shopping arcade with a total gross floor area of 18,043.45 square meters located in Chongqing. In addition, it provides management and distressed asset management services; and sells flowers, seedlings, and plants. The company was formerly known as Dowell Property Holdings Limited and changed its name to in Doyen International Holdings Limited in June 2016. Doyen International Holdings Limited was incorporated in 1990 and is based in Wanchai, Hong Kong. Doyen International Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Money Success Limited.
